Odin Recipes

About the Project

Odin Recipes is my first HTML project completed as part of the The Odin Project Foundation curriculum.
The project consists of a home page that linked to thre recipes pages. Rech recipe page includes an image of the recipe, the description, unordered list of ingredients, ordered list of steps involved in preparing the recipe and a link back to the main page.

Live Demo

Visit the live website at 

https://seguntj.github.io/odin-recipes/

Built With

HTML5, Git and GitHub Pages

What i Learned

Creat and structure HTML pages
Use boilerplate, headings, paragraphs, lists, links and images
Organize files and folders
Use git for version control
Stage, commit and push project to GitHub
Deploy a websie using GitHub Pages
Debug common issues such as image paths, file naming/renaming

Future Improvement

Improve the visual design
Apply the subsequent knowledge on CSS and JavaScript

Author

Olusegun Tijani
